findings: Sandbox tool governance must load before planning, coding, archive/hash, export, and final response decisions.
Coding stages require a coding plan before modification and tests after each slice.
Use python3 -S for stdlib-only OS work; normal python requires probe/justification.
Export latency must be controlled with bounded archive/hash checks and receipts.
Replace stale /00_BOOT verifier assumption with root-resolving complete-system smoke verifier.
